give me a list of all drinks of coffee shops in newyourk city

Here is a list of popular coffee shops in New York City and some of the drinks they offer:

1. Blue Bottle Coffee - Drip coffee, espresso, cappuccino, latte, cold brew

2. La Colombe - Drip coffee, latte, cappuccino, espresso, cold brew, draft latte

3. Joe Coffee - Drip coffee, espresso, macchiato, cappuccino, latte, cold brew

4. Stumptown Coffee Roasters - Drip coffee, espresso, cappuccino, latte, cold brew, nitro cold brew

5. Bluestone Lane - Drip coffee, flat white, latte, cappuccino, matcha latte, cold brew

6. Irving Farm Coffee Roasters - Drip coffee, espresso, cappuccino, latte, cold brew, matcha latte

7. Gregorys Coffee - Drip coffee, espresso, macchiato, cappuccino, latte, cold brew

8. Birch Coffee - Drip coffee, espresso, cortado, cappuccino, latte, cold brew

9. Toby's Estate Coffee - Drip coffee, espresso, cortado, cappuccino, latte, cold brew, matcha latte

10. Box Kite Coffee - Drip coffee, espresso, cortado, cappuccino, latte, cold brew, matcha latte.
